title: Parent
description: A Parent object represents the parent of a page, database, or block. The parent can be a workspace, page, database, or block.

database_id.description: The ID of the parent database. Present when type is "database_id".

page_id.description: The ID of the parent page. Present when type is "page_id".

block_id.description: The ID of the parent block. Present when type is "block_id".

workspace.description: Always true when the parent is the workspace. Present when type is "workspace".
